creator: amzo1337@gmail.com
text:
Sorry about that, I got you confused with py-keras port which I have an update for to bring it to 2.9.0. Though it requires tensorflow 2.9.0 as a dependency which requires this port to be updated to fix the dependency chain.


keras-preprocessing:1.1.1 > tensorflow:2.9.1 > keras:2.9.0
